Results for 'top things to do and restaurants' in Normandy, France:
1. Mémorial de Caen [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.6 (23000 reviews)
   🕐 Closed · Opens 9 AM
   📍 Esp. Général Eisenhower
   "The food was also reasonably priced and of good quality."
2. Hull & Oak [Southern] ⭐ 4.6 (1200 reviews) | $20–30
   🕐 Closed · Opens 6:30 AM Sun
   📍 1070 Dallas St
   "Super trendy with great food and service!"
3. The Ranch at Las Colinas [Southwestern American] ⭐ 4.6 (7400 reviews) | $20–70
   📍 857 W John Carpenter Fwy
   "Impeccable food, drinks, service and atmosphere."
4. La Parenthèse [French] ⭐ 4.4 (1400 reviews) | €20–30
   🕐 Closed · Opens 10 AM
   📍 96 Rue Claude Monet
   "Gorgeous views, excellent food and outstanding service."
5. Château de Boutemont [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.7 (944 reviews)
   🕐 Closed · Opens 11 AM
   📍 Château de Boutemont, 7 Chem. de Bouttemont
   "Lovely garden, great food and nice staff."
